name: AutoTrader EchoPark Automotive 400
comments: Chase Elliott won the Autotrader EchoPark Automotive 400 at Texas Motor Speedway, his 19th victory in the NASCAR Xfinity Series. Prior to the start of the race the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty: No. 8 (backup car), Nos. 15, 84 (unapproved adjustments).
